case_title: MOTLEY, JAMES VS SAN FRANCISCO FINE ARTS MUSEUM C/O SJOSTROM, - et al

docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOTLEY, JAMES RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FINE ARTS MUSEUM C/O SJOSTROM, - $250.00 PRINCIPAL, $122.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $372.00, DEFENDANT FAILED TO APPEAR. PLAINTIFF DISMISSED CASE AGAINST DEFENDNAT ALBORQUE, DEBBIE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SC MOTION DISPOSITION MOTION TO VACATE JUDGMENT OF FEB-14-2005, GRANTED
SUBPOENA ISSUED TO PARKER, HARRY S. 100 34TH AVE., SF CA 94121
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JAN-18-2005, CONTINUED BY COURT TO MAR-14-2005 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FINE ARTS MUSEUM C/O SJOSTROM, -
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT LESLI N., LEGAL ASST.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MOTLEY, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FINE ARTS MUSEUM C/O SJOSTROM, - LESLI N., LEGAL ASST. THE PROVISION OF GOVERNMENT CODE 945.6 APPLY TO THE FACTS OF THIS CASE. PLAINTIFF DID NOT FILE A CLAIM WITH THE DEFT BEFORE BRINGING HIS SUIT FOR MONEY OR DAMAGES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $500.00 FILED BY MOTLEY, JAMES AS TO DEFENDANT SAN FRANCISCO FINE ARTS MUSEUM C/O SJOSTROM, - LESLI N., LEGAL ASST. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-18-2005 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT 506
